mentions.note: Also understated by Jensen despite in-house chip development. Cramer advocates owning all three (Nvidia, Amazon, Alphabet) given massive opportunity; don't force either/or choice.
Gemini trapped in middle pack despite improvements; Cramer comparing to Google vs. Bing search—Claude dominance creates opportunity for Google if they pivot.
Gemini 3 platform winning consumer AI race (750M monthly users); $175–185B capex spend justified; spending to win like Google did against Bing; $4T market cap not sweating program.
